raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general request to check the passage centrally includes verifying that the methodological and evaluative claims cohere without internal contradictions.","R1.3":"The passage reports metrics, baselines, and claimed improvements, so checking whether those claims align with the reported evidence is centrally expected.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose with evident sentence-level density and flow issues, writing polish is load-bearing.","RX.1":"The projection should preserve uncertainty about the intended meaning of the terse delegation.","RX.2":"The checker should avoid endorsing claims beyond what the provided artifact supports.","RX.3":"The task is only to check the provided passage, so scope adherence is always active.","RX.4":"The projection should prevent harmful downstream effects such as overstating methodological validity or results.","RX.5":"Any responsibility should remain traceable to the delegation and the artifact text."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general request to check the passage centrally includes verifying that the methodological and evaluative claims cohere without internal contradictions.
rationale.R1.3: The passage reports metrics, baselines, and claimed improvements, so checking whether those claims align with the reported evidence is centrally expected.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is broad and the artifact is prose with evident sentence-level density and flow issues, writing polish is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: The projection should preserve uncertainty about the intended meaning of the terse delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The checker should avoid endorsing claims beyond what the provided artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The task is only to check the provided passage, so scope adherence is always active.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should prevent harmful downstream effects such as overstating methodological validity or results.
rationale.RX.5: Any responsibility should remain traceable to the delegation and the artifact text.
